description_long: This is a pair of low-top canvas sneakers with a classic design, featuring a predominantly gray upper and black heel collar. The shoes have white rubber toe caps and midsoles, with black piping running along the edge of the sole. Metal eyelets secure the gray laces, which are threaded in a standard criss-cross pattern. The heel area is reinforced and displays visible branding, while the interior appears padded for comfort. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for everyday urban wear.
description: A pair of gray and black low-top canvas sneakers with white rubber soles and toe caps, featuring metal eyelets and criss-cross lacing.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the gray canvas upper, white toe caps, and laces with metal eyelets.
description_view_1: Side and rear view highlighting the black heel collar and the smooth transition between the gray upper and black back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the branded heel tab and padded interior, with both shoes' backs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side and front view, emphasizing the lateral profile and the clean, classic silhouette.
attribute_logo: Text logo on the heel tab in black, rectangular patch on tongue
